title: Lion Rock Fortress
description: Climb the ancient volcanic plateau and witness the palace of King Kasyapa.

title: Nine Arch Bridge
description: Witness the iconic colonial-era railway bridge nestled in lush tea fields.

title: Golden Whale Coast
description: Relax on pristine beaches or head out for a whale-watching journey.

title: Leopard Safari
description: Explore the wild heart of Sri Lanka and spot the elusive leopards.

title: Nuwara Eliya
description: Visit the Little England of Sri Lanka and explore the lush misty tea plantations.

title: Galle Fort
description: Walk through the historic colonial fortress and witness the iconic lighthouse at sunset.
